sentence: I want you to go to the paper with this title: "NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows", find the citations at the bottom of the paper, and then follow the link to the paper about human imitation.

workflow.name: Start Browser and Go to Google Scholar
workflow.description: Opens a new browser tab and navigates to Google Scholar to begin searching for the paper.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Search for the Target Paper
workflow.description: Enters the full title of the specified paper into the Google Scholar search bar and initiates the search.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com
If a search input with name 'q' is visible
actions: Type 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' into the input with name 'q'

workflow.name: Click Target Paper from Search Results
workflow.description: Locates and clicks the search result link that exactly matches the paper's title.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com/scholar
If a link with text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
actions: Click the link with text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'

workflow.name: Scroll to Citations Section
workflow.description: After navigating to the paper's page, scrolls down to reveal the references or citations section.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible

workflow.name: Follow 'Human Imitation' Citation
workflow.description: Identifies and clicks the citation link related to 'human imitation' within the references section of the paper.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
If a link containing 'human imitation' is visible

workflow.name: Arrived at Human Imitation Paper
workflow.description: Confirms successful navigation to the paper about human imitation.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'
If text 'human imitation' is visible
actions: Terminate: Successfully navigated to the paper about human imitation

state_names: Start Browser and Go to Google Scholar
Click Target Paper from Search Results

sentence: I want you to go to the paper with this title: "NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows", find the citations at the bottom of the paper, and then follow the link to the paper about human imitation.

workflow.name: Start Browser and Go to Google Scholar
workflow.description: Opens a new browser tab and navigates to Google Scholar to begin searching for the paper.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/

workflow.name: Search for the Target Paper
workflow.description: Enters the full title of the specified paper into the Google Scholar search bar and initiates the search.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com
If a search input with name 'q' is visible
actions: Type 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' into the input with name 'q'

workflow.name: Click Target Paper from Search Results
workflow.description: Locates and clicks the search result link that contains the paper's title, allowing for minor variations.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com/scholar
If a link with text contains 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
actions: Click the link with text contains 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'

workflow.name: Scroll to Citations Section
workflow.description: After navigating to the paper's page, scrolls down to reveal the references or citations section. This assumes the paper page is loaded and not on Google Scholar.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible

workflow.name: Follow 'Human Imitation' Citation
workflow.description: Identifies and clicks the citation link related to 'human imitation' within the references section of the paper. This state assumes the NetGent paper page is loaded and the citations are visible.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
If a link containing 'human imitation' is visible

workflow.name: Arrived at Human Imitation Paper
workflow.description: Confirms successful navigation to the paper about human imitation. Triggers are broadened to account for various landing page types (publisher page, PDF, etc.) and less strict text matching, checking page title, URL, and visible text for keywords.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'
If the page title contains 'imitation'
If the page title contains 'mimicry'
If the page title contains 'human'
If the current URL contains 'pdf'
If text contains 'imitation'
If text contains 'mimicry'
If text contains 'human'
actions: Terminate: Successfully navigated to the paper about human imitation

state_names: Start Browser and Go to Google Scholar
Click Target Paper from Search Results

lint_issues.message: 8 triggers on one state -- unusually many. Triggers are OR'd together in NetGent, so this may match more pages than intended.

sentence: I want you to go to the paper with this title: "NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows", find the citations at the bottom of the paper, and then follow the link to the paper about human imitation.

workflow.name: Start Browser and Go to Google Scholar
workflow.description: Opens a new browser tab and navigates to Google Scholar to begin searching for the paper. This state is triggered when a new, blank tab is opened.
triggers: If the current URL is chrome://new-tab-page/
If the current URL is about:blank

workflow.name: Search for the Target Paper
workflow.description: Enters the full title of the specified paper into the Google Scholar search bar and initiates the search.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com
If a search input with name 'q' is visible
actions: Type 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' into the input with name 'q'

workflow.name: Click Target Paper from Search Results
workflow.description: Locates and clicks the search result link that contains the paper's title, allowing for minor variations. This state expects to be on the Google Scholar search results page.
triggers: If the current URL contains scholar.google.com/scholar
If a link with text contains 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
actions: Click the link with text contains 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'

workflow.name: Scroll to Citations Section
workflow.description: After navigating to the paper's page (off Google Scholar), scrolls down to reveal the references or citations section. This assumes the paper page is loaded and the target paper's title is visible.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible

workflow.name: Follow 'Human Imitation' Citation
workflow.description: Identifies and clicks the citation link related to 'human imitation' within the references section of the paper. This state assumes the NetGent paper page is loaded, the citations are visible, and the link is present.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain scholar.google.com
If text 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows' is visible
If a link containing 'human imitation' is visible

workflow.name: Arrived at Human Imitation Paper
workflow.description: Confirms successful navigation to the paper about human imitation. Triggers are broadened to account for various landing page types (publisher page, PDF, etc.) and less strict text matching, checking page title, URL, and visible text for keywords.
triggers: If the current URL does not contain 'NetGent: Agent-Based Automation of Network Application Workflows'
If the page title contains 'imitation'
If the page title contains 'mimicry'
If the page title contains 'human'
If the current URL contains 'pdf'
If text contains 'imitation'
If text contains 'mimicry'
If text contains 'human'
actions: Terminate: Successfully navigated to the paper about human imitation

Click Target Paper from Search Results
